nameMeanings.name: Angerer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Oskar, Otto.
South German: topographic name for a dweller by a meadow or village green (see   Anger  ) or a habitational name for someone from any of numerous places so named in Bavaria and Austria.

variants.name: Anger
meanings: German: topographic name for a dweller by a meadow or village green, from Middle High German anger ‘grassland, field’, or a habitational name from any of several places in Germany and Austria named with this word.
French and English (of Norman origin): from a variant of the personal name   Angier  .

nameMeanings.name: Magdalena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Magdalene
meanings: New Testament: byname of Mary Magdalene. See Madeleine .

en.lifeSummary: Magdalena Angerer was born as the daughter of Hanns Angerer. She married Conrad Weegbsetzer in 1628, in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.
